title: cast for the catch — catch content config
description: Marketing-editable catch pool. Edit proof facts, tune base values, add catches — no code change required. Validated at load by src/content/catches.ts.

version.description: Bump when the content meaningfully changes (used for cache-busting).

id.description: Stable id. Used in telemetry/analytics — do not reuse or rename casually.

label.description: The 'better' shown to the player. Sentence case, no ALL CAPS.

rarity.description: Drives catch probability and difficulty of landing. Rarer = harder + higher value.

baseValue.description: Base points before combo and timing bonus.

proofFact.description: One-line proof fact. Short, sentence case, on-brand (intelligent, witty, confident).

triggersLeadCapture.description: If true, landing this catch opens the shared lead-capture form with the reward pre-attached.
